title: Hanobe Rustic Wooden Serving Tray: Round Wood Decorative Candle Holder Vintage Centerpiece Butler Trays Farmhouse Ottoman Tray for Decor Kitchen Countertop for Home Coffee Table
features: HIGH QUALITY - Made of the premium paulownia wood, both durable sturdy and super lightweight, about 40% less weight than ordinary wood,hard-wearing and serviceable for a long period to use.The perfect outer 11.2" size（inner diam 10"）to serve your favorite food and drink for breakfast in bed, parties or for weddings.

DECORATION IDEAS - The hand-crafted distressed finish is truly artistic accent decor pieces, rustic style crafted to accentuate your home decor. add your favorite pillar candles to create a unique candle holder tray or add orbs and make an interesting centerpiece for your coffee table.

MULTI-DESIGN &PURPOSE - Carefully designed for form and function, the curved edges on these rustic tray help to avoid sliding food or spilling liquids. Suitable for rustic table centerpieces and uses on the entryway table, vanity, mantle. our tray is multipurpose and used as a TV tray, couch tray, sofa tray, or coffee tray in any living room.

GREAT GIFT - The decorative tray will look great in any setting, the circle design makes it easy to store your trays away anywhere in your kitchen and bring an element of modern country decor. perfectly for birthdays, weddings, Christmas, baby showers, housewarming, or other holiday celebrations and makes a great gift idea.

WARRANTY: Hanobe always put customer satisfaction in our top-priority position and offer 12 months quality assurance and LIFETIME professional customer service. If you have any problems with our products or services, please feel free to contact us anytime, we’ll get back to you within 24 hours. Buy with confidence!

Made of the premium paulownia wood, both durable sturdy & super lightweight, about 40% less weight than ordinary wood,hard-wearing and serviceable for a long period to use. Is This Food Safe? Not food safe,for decorative use only. if you wish to make it food safe, we recommend applying a coat of food-grade mineral oil to the wooden tray. How to Clean the Wooden Tray? Never submerge in water, if moisture falls on the bowl promptly wipe it, don't place in dishwasher or microwave & occasionally rub with food safe mineral oil.
